title: More customisation options for 'People' columns.
excerpt:
Description
Currently when using a People column, the users profile photo by default. If the user doesn’t have a profile photo then the users initials will show. We have multiple users in the same team who have the same …

posts.author: MichaelAnderson (Michael Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently when using a People column, the users profile photo by default. If the user doesn’t have a profile photo then the users initials will show. We have multiple users in the same team who have the same initials, which makes it difficult at first glance to see which user the item relates to. We understand we can hover over the avatar to see further details, but we’ve had feedback that it would be better if the people column could be customised further.

It would be nice if a ‘People’ column could be customised to either show ‘Initials Only’ or perhaps ‘First Name Only’ or ‘Full Name’. That way, a ‘People’ column could be changed from circular avatar icons to text i.e. ‘Michael Anderson’ rather than ‘MA’.

What are you trying to achieve

Better visibility over who the user in the ‘People’ column actually is. I’m looking for further customisation options to be able to change the view of a ‘People’ column to First Name, Full Name, or Avatars/Initials.
